title: HL spotState live-balance validation
description: Validates the HyperLiquid spotState WebSocket fix end-to-end. Resets any leaked payment-token state, then runs hl-balance-validation in Unified mode to assert: (1) availableToTradeBalance is populated and >= availableBalance (fold invariant), (2) the PerpsMarketListView balance row renders availableToTradeBalance, (3) the PerpsWithdrawView balance row renders availableBalance (non-regression — spot fold must NOT leak into the withdraw path), and (4) the PerpsOrderView Pay-with row defaults to 'Perps balance' rather than an external USDC fallback when spot collateral is available. Passing proves: subscription established, stream handler populates #cachedSpotState, addSpotBalanceToAccountState folds spot total + tracks hold, adapter / aggregator propagate the new field, UI consumers prefer it over raw availableBalance. External-client probe and UI-driven open/close cycles are deferred to a follow-up recipe once the underlying trade-open-market flow is fixed for the RedesignedConfirmations route.
